positive: A mystical forest creature silhouette, blending elements of a majestic owl and deep forest flora. The creature is centered, perched among stylized, oversized mushrooms and glowing bioluminescent ferns. The artwork must utilize heavy line work, strong graphic contrast, and a limited, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, jade green, and burnished gold. Style of Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration, highly stylized, symmetrical composition, excellent negative space for print readability. Focus on clean lines and solid, unmistakable silhouettes.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, low detail, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, childish, realistic photo, gradient fade
